name: vscode-copilot-models-provider
description: Add OpenAI-compatible third-party chat models to the VSCode Copilot model picker.

commands.title: Generate Commit Message with Custom Model

customModels.models.description: List of custom OpenAI-compatible chat models shown in the VS Code model picker. API keys are stored separately via the 'Custom Models: Manage Models' command.

id.description: Unique local identifier for this model configuration.

name.description: Display name shown in the model picker.

model.description: Upstream model identifier sent in the OpenAI-compatible request body.

providerLabel.description: Optional detail label shown next to the model.

baseUrl.description: Provider base URL or a full chat completions endpoint URL.

apiPath.description: Optional path appended to baseUrl. Leave empty for automatic '/v1/chat/completions' resolution.

authMode.description: How the stored API key should be sent. 'bearer' uses Authorization: Bearer <key>, 'header' uses the configured header name, and 'none' sends no API key.

apiKeyHeaderName.description: Header name used when authMode is 'header'.

toolCalling.description: Whether the model supports tool calling.

vision.description: Whether the model accepts image input.

useForGitCommitMessage.description: Whether this model should be used for Git commit message generation. Only one model can enable this at a time.

maxInputTokens.description: Maximum input token budget reported to VS Code.

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output token budget reported to VS Code.

requestHeaders.description: Additional static request headers sent with every request.

showInModelPicker.description: Whether the model should be shown in the picker.

customModels.requestTimeoutSeconds.description: Network timeout in seconds for custom model requests.

customModels.gitCommitMessage.systemProm.description: Optional system prompt override for Git commit message generation. Leave empty to use the built-in localized prompt.
